<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Evidence: The object tagged as 34 corresponds to a key \(Key\_34\) located at position \(x=0.52, y=0.54, z=0.38\) on the table. Initial attempts to pick it at previous positions failed as they were out of reach. After using the Look tool to better observe the object's position and moving closer to \(x=0.54, y=0.54, z=0.38\), I successfully picked the key. Decision and next action: The task is completed. I have picked the object tagged as 34 for you.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>
